concerns.text: FR-007 mandates a 'paired t-test... using robust standard errors (HC3)' with 10,000 bootstrap iterations. T032 implements a 'Wilcoxon signed-rank test' and T033 implements a 'Welch's t-test' (independent samples). Neither task implements the specific paired t-test with HC3 robust errors required by the spec, constituting a semantic weakening of the statistical requirement.

FR-008 and Constitution Principle VI require the external consistency check to use the 'HuggingFaceH4/image-reward model' to calculate a Pearson correlation. T034_human_ground_truth instead implements fetching a 'static, human-annotated benchmark dataset'. This introduces an unauthorized data dependency and fails to implement the model-based proxy validation mandated by the spec.

FR-008 requires reporting the Pearson correlation (r) between the VLM-derived Gap and the Proxy-derived Gap. T036 lists 'Validation: Comparison of calculated gap against Human Ground Truth' but does not explicitly include the calculation or reporting of the Pearson correlation coefficient against the HuggingFaceH4/image-reward model, dropping a key acceptance criterion.

FR-009 requires a 're-curation loop (up to 2 iterations)' if the OOD similarity threshold fails. T015a and T016 describe a single validation step with an abort condition but lack the logic for iterative re-sampling and the loop counter, silently relaxing the data integrity constraint.

FR-010 requires generating a 'power_analysis_report.json' artifact containing 'achieved statistical power', 'MDES at N=500', and a 'Variance Saturation Check' flag. T034_pilot_power_gate mentions calculating power and blocking the run but does not explicitly mandate the generation of the specific artifact with all three required fields (MDES and Variance Saturation flag) as a deliverable.

SC-005 requires flagging prompts for 'manual review' if variance exceeds a threshold. T035 calculates variance and flags prompts but does not explicitly link the output to a 'manual review' workflow or define the threshold source as per the spec's acceptance criteria, potentially dropping the operational intent of the success criterion.
